name: Implement Redis Connection Pooling
desc: Deploy pre-authenticated, multiplexed Redis connection pools to reduce TCP socket overhead and file descriptor exhaustion during high-concurrency agent swarm operations.

name: Replace console.log with Pino Structured Logger
desc: Eliminate all synchronous console.log calls system-wide. Replace with Pino async JSON structured logging for machine-readable telemetry indexed by agent ID, trace ID, and latency.

name: Audit and Minimize Production Dependency Graph
desc: Evaluate all 14 production dependencies. Shift non-runtime libraries to devDependencies and replace heavyweight packages with native Node.js modules where possible.

name: Deploy Standardized /health Endpoints per Service
desc: Expose consistent HTTP health check endpoints on all internal micro-services for network load balancer probes and automatic traffic routing away from failing containers.

name: Implement Eternal ScrollChain Immutable Ledger
desc: Build a DAG-based immutable audit ledger logging all multi-agent decisions, context window states, and swarm logic sequences as the ultimate source of truth.

name: Deploy Trinity Bridge Multi-LLM Consensus Layer
desc: Establish concurrent synchronized API connections to Claude, GPT, and Grok for cross-model consensus validation on critical agent outputs.

name: Enforce SAST CodeQL/Semgrep PR Gating
desc: Block all PR merges unless passing CodeQL or Semgrep static analysis. Parse Python and JavaScript control-flow to identify injection vectors, XSS, and insecure endpoints.

name: Harden Dockerfile Multi-Stage Non-Root Build
desc: Verify multi-stage builds copy only compiled artifacts to a minimal production image. Enforce non-root USER and add HEALTHCHECK instruction to prevent privilege escalation.

name: Implement Post-Deploy Smoke Test in deploy-render.yml
desc: Add automated health-check smoke tests to the Render deployment workflow. Auto-rollback if the service fails to return a healthy status code post-launch.

name: Enforce Branch Protection and PR Review Governance
desc: Mandate at least one approving review plus passing Jest, SAST, and dependency audit status checks before any merge to main branch.

name: Integrate npm audit Dependency Review in CI
desc: Add strict npm audit and dependency-review-action to the CI pipeline. Verify all third-party libraries against known CVE databases before integration.

name: Implement Bi-Directional Data Sync for Agent Grounding
desc: Establish millisecond-latency bi-directional data streams combining online logic with real-world IoT inputs to prevent agent hallucinations and ensure operational alignment.
